channel.title: china on E-daemonia
channel.description: Recent content in china on E-daemonia

item.title: No True Dragon (非眞龍)
item.description: The dragon that can be penned in is no true dragon.

item.title: Wind Blows Through the Bamboo Sparse (風來疎竹)
item.description: Though wind blows through the bamboo sparse / When it has passed the wood does not the sound retain.

item.title: Honking Osprey (關雎)
item.description: The honking osprey rests upon / The islands of the River great / The lady of good bearing is / The man of virtue’s perfect mate.
